reviews.text:
The clinic doesn’t live up to its obligations. The day 2 test as well as the fit-to-fly-test were late. Don’t expect your test results within 40+ hours. Please note these 40+ hours only apply when you call customer service yourself.
Making an appointment was quite easy. Customer service is polite, but I’m sorry to say that doesn’t get your results in time for your flight.

***
Regen Clinic team has replied and asked us to send an email. We did no reply. That was 1 week ago. I wonder what their response time to mails is? 48 days? 48 months?

My partner and I booked a Day2 test back on 8/19, waited a week to receive our Unique Reference ID and emailed the clinic directly, no response. Finally, I received the auto-generated response including my ID on 8/28, but my partner is still waiting for his and has emailed directly requesting it last week. Also no response.

Understand you guys are busy, but to be 3 weeks behind on sending these out what's said to arrive within 1 hour AND not responding to emails sent, there is no excuse for. Hoping our experience getting tested at your clinic when we arrive is better than what we've seen so far.

Absolute joke of a service, as you can clearly see from the photos.
Booked a test for 10 AM and arrived on time just to find a cue of 25 ppl. Clearly money hunger and a poor management can be translated into OVERBOOKED. Also hope Canary Wharf Management will take some action as the waiting crowd blocks exist/access routes to DLR.

UPDATE: On return I had booked my 2 day PCR test that was supposed to arrive on 13th December. It did not arrive, I am once again on the phone with customer services who are struggling to understand what has happened (again) and have no PCR test...

DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY

Today I upgraded to an express 4-hour test. I took this test at 9am GMT with results expected to be sent by 1pm GMT latest.

At 1pm I did not receive my results. I tried to call but there was a very long wait (I was number 79 in the line), so I went back to the local clinic where I had the test in the morning where the manager and her colleague tried their best to help me.

They had to call several people and I waited in the clinic over an hour and a half to get to the bottom of what had happened. Simply, my test had not been processed and if I had not gone into the clinic, I have no idea if it would have been. At this point people in my business were waiting for that information with a knock-on impact. Not only that but I had to take 3 hours out of work to deal with the issue and my results were over 2 hours late.

I understand there was one other gentleman waiting to get his express test with the same issue, only he was waiting to visit his sick child in hospital and could not do so until the test was returned. I can only imagine how frustrating it was for him.

I have emailed and asked for an explanation for the inexcusable experience I have had with this company as well as a full refund. I did not expect to pay almost £400 for something they could not deliver, this is misleading.

All this being said, the staff in the Kingston branch could not have been better and I would like to thank them for helping however they could .

Worst possible service.

After paying it well in advance for day 2 and Day 8 package, I got home and all …

WILL NOT BE GETTING SERVICE FROM THIS CLINIC AGAIN !

This result timeline is not as promised when I booked and paid the competitive …

I paid approx. 100 pounds for a 24-36 PCR fit to fly test. I called at 30hrs and was assured that the result would be sent to me at 36 hrs.  It was not. I was extremely anxious, as I needed it to board a plane. I was left with having to …

VERY UNPROFESSIONAL
I spent more than 60£ per covid test and they took more than 80 hours for sending me the Day 2 Test’s results also if the Clinic said they would have taken a …

Would give 0 stars if i could. I ordered the day 2&8 tests on the 3rd of October, i did not receive anything on day 2. Called and called just to be put on hold for how many hours. At the end i only received a partial refund. very unfair. …

I have booked a day 5 express test to release with results in 3 hours. I did not get the results in 3 hours as test was inconclusive. I got called back to the clinic to do it again. Done it again just before midnight got the result and …

Did the Day 2 test and got my result 5 days after I arrived back in the UK. Not sure how useful the test is when results get submitted almost a week later, in particular as I've been told that it would take no more than 48 hours. …

Don't go! Paid £169 for same day results PCR test. Took the test yesterday, Dec 2 and was supposed to get my results by midnight. Midnight, nothing, I call and was number 25 on the queue. I immediately realised that the other 24 were in the …

Unmet 48 hour test result promise.52 hours wait time, despite fact that laboratory reported results 8 hours after taking test. Unnecessary stress for me and my husband to make us wait 52 hours and get results of Day 2 test only after I …

If I could leave a zero star review I would. I booked the same-day Covid-19 test and I did my test at 11.55AM. I was told at the testing site that my results would come out by midnight or 6 AM at the latest. I purposely paid EXTRA for same …

I paid for a same day test ( Covid for for travel certificate ) and didn't get it till the next day , no apology or refund . Then the test certificate put my year of birth as "64959" month and day were also incorrect ( is that proof I am a …

Two terrible experiences with them in the last week.

Firstly, they failed to send the day 2 booking reference test (surely this …

Late with results and therefore not useful to anyone needing testing to travel or before planning to see vulnerable people etc.
I was up early on the day of my train to call the clinic to try and chase my …

Absolutely atrocious, first test posted in and lost by the lab, mixed me up with another person with the same name, compromising patient confidentiality. After lost test, went in to one of their clinics, 48 hours later no results, 30 …

Absolutely pathetic. Ordered a same day PCR test, went into the Kingston clinic where the lady swabbed one side of my nose.  I was told I would receive the results by midnight latest guaranteed. By 6pm, I called to ask about my results and …

Where should I start!! I paid £149 for day 2&8 never received my tests. Then I did a Day 2 in the clinic, never received my results. I  was waiting for my refund for over 2 weeks. Once I got the refund, it was partially refunded, so now I'm …

I am rating due to the experience my partner is currently having for "same day results guaranteed" fit to fly covid test.
He was meant to fly on Saturday 07 August. He paid a premium for same day …

I have booked  a Same day PCR test done it the 31/12/21 at 4.25pm in Soho London, as I have paid a lot of money for a specific service that i haven't received. The results was supposed to arrive at some point at the end of the same day, and …

Booked in a time-slot for a Same Day Result Covid Test (for quite a high fee) in London. I had to stand in line for an hour in the pouring rain outside (even though I had a time allocated slot booked), got a test where the lady hardly …

My partner and I had pre-departure Covid tests here and unfortunately I am sorry to say it was very unprofessional. One time we had a test result sent with the wrong result (!) we asked to change it and they did it. Anyone can make mistakes …

Absolute shcoking ordeal with these guys.

The first time I used them they sent me my PCR results 1hour before boarding the …

On 11Sept 21, booked Day 2 & 8 RTPCR test for son flying to Manchester
Day 2 was on 20 September no delivery of the kits.
No response to multiple mail.
Call center no's are so busy that we need to wait for 10-15 minutes.. agent on call have no update on delivery of kits.
No online tracking available for user.
No idea when will kits be delivered

Don't go!!! Paid £99 each for my mother and mother in law for a same day results PCR test. Took the test yesterday, on 4th December, and was supposed to get the results by midnight. We didn't received any result yet. It is now 11am on Dec 5 and I still haven't received my results. We tried to contact them, we've been queueing for 2 hours and then, when it finally was our turn, they hang up. Don't go!!! At least we deserve a refund!!!

i have never ever in my life ever dealt with a private clinic like this before. This business is the equivalent of mcdonalds without any satisfaction.

The telephone staff have zero people skills and come across as disinterested, and forget you have just paid £300 for a test. I was emailed saying i was contacted but had no missed call. my test was inconclusive and that it would be re run tomorrow. this is unacceptable as i paid for a same day service. Katie N informed me that inconclusive is a result. this in anyone's opinion is not a same day result. they should have re run the sample immediately to make good on the promise i paid for.

STAY AWAY

Absolute trash of a customer service. I booked the same day pcr and have yet to receive the results 25 hours later. I called the customer service 4 times and my calls was DECLINED the last 2 times. Both times I had waited for more than 30 …

Very disappointed! "Brighton Day 2 PCR Next Day Results" means that 72 hrs later and we're still stuck at home, self isolating because we have not received the results via e-mail. Yes, we've checked the "spam" folder. The websites advertises results within 48 hrs, clearly that's not the case.
I am going to request a refund. EDIT: 96 hrs later and still no test results, no contact whatsoever from this company. I suggest to book your tests somewhere else.

Absolutely atrocious. We were guaranteed our PCR test results for “fit to fly” 36 hours out. Nothing. When we called to get an update on our status we are out on a queue with over 100 callers. When we make it to 3rd in line the call …

HORRIBLE SERVICE. I got day2 PCR test with overnight result and paid £119 as i needed the result quicker than other tests. The result didn't come by the time they promised (6am) and when i called them( waited half an hour in the early …

Total scam, a shame!! We passed 4 pcr tests with results the same day! The first 2 results arrived the next day, the third at. Outs of 2 days and mine … never arrived! Today I paid for a test without ever receiving my result! I had to …

To obtain PCR test results, I chose to pay more for what appeared to be a reputable company guaranteeing the test result within 48 hours of posting, with prepaid priority envelopes. Exactly what I needed.I followed their delivery …

Very slow service. I had my 2-day PCR at midday on Sunday and still hadn't had my result 48 hrs later, although my partner and 2 friends who had them at the same time had got theirs. It took 25 minutes on hold to find out where my result …

This Day 2 arrival test made mandatory by the UK gov't was supposed to deliver results within 48 hours of the swab. Unfortunately, I had to contact the company via email twice to get my results after paying $54 USD and being questioned by …

Avoid. Booked a day 2 PCR with them. 48h later, no results. Tried calling and waiting for almost 2h in line only for the line to drop/hung up (guess we'll never know). I understand that with the recent re-introduction of measures they might …

I have serious concerns about a Fit to Fly PCR test I took at the Regenerative Clinic, including errors, failure in internal checking processes and potential impact this could have had on my ability to go abroad. …

A 2-day test that takes 11 days to come in!
And then trying to communicate with them as a company was absolutely brutal.
I did my 2-day test when I travelled back from the United States and had to …

I booked and did a Day2 test there (september 4) and until today (September 13) i haven't received the result. I emailed them and tried to call, but nobody return me. It's such a terrible service for wich i paid £65. I am completely  frustaded.

Unacceptable and poor service.

Quoted time on the results was 24-36 hours after paying for the 99 gbp test.

Got the results in 45 hours
Repeated phone calls after the 36 hour window were met with “I’m sorry nothing we can do, the Lab has not loaded the results.”
I live in the UAE and you get your results in 5-6 hours for around 10 gbp.
Do not use this company.

They're a SCAM network until proven otherwise. They've taken my money, lost my sample, ignored my emails, then delayed my results by 6 days. 45 days and £40 over my usual phone bill, I'm still waiting for a refund. It's concerning that they can keep going...

DO NOT BOOK here! My fit to fly Test never arrived and they make you wait +60 minutes in their customer service hotline. This is unacceptable and unprofessional. Will never book with them again. There are reliable providers out there. The Regenerative Clinics is certainly none of them.

Wife was sent multiple negative result certificates that were apparently invalid just to get a positive certificate afterwards. No proactive communication, just 12 emails with 10 negative and 2 positive results and we had to call in to …

My partner booked a day-2 PCR test and he was supposed to go to the clinic in Canary Wharf branch after his trip from France but upon his returned, he was tested positive and to quarantine at home for 10 days. He called the clinic to ask them to mail the PCR kit to him instead with additional cost. They said ok and after like 4 to 5 days quarantined, no package receive and he contacted them again and again and emailed but no reply. After the 10 days quarantined, he went to the clinic to pick up the PCR kit, the guy at the Canary Wharf told him to pick up one kit off the counter. He told the staff he ordered PCR kit and not ANT Kit. The staff brushed him off saying the government has changed to ANT test and there is nothing he can do. How about providing a good customer service and refund the balance to my partner. So he took the ANT kit and did the test and tried to register the result online, The Regenerative Clinic did not even register his email. This is such a bad service and it shows they only care about taking customer's money and not delivering the goods. It is as good as scamming people's money. Too bad I was not around or I would bang the table and ask for a full refund on the spot or will report to the police. Don't ever use their service!

DO NOT USE- I booked a same day results PCR test & didn’t receive  my results on the same day so missed my event I required the PCR test for & caused a great deal of stressed. I had to call & email many times & even though they didn’t return my test results in the correct time period I didn’t even receive a full refund

I had my day 2 test done here and was supposed to receive my results within 48 hours. I heard nothing from them so decided to contact them. Someone gave me a call back 9 in the evening explaining to me that I would get it the day after. I received nothing so I contacted them again. Again someone tried to call me 10Pm this time and I chose not to answer. I emailed them and told them I wanted my results emailed to me and that I do not wish anyone to call me in the evening. Someone tried to call me the day after, still no email response. Once again I did not answer. I emailed them for every day for 8 days. The 9th day, I received a text message that said that "my results was on its way to my email box" which I found to be quite funny because if you do send an email, you receive it immediately. It's not a snail mail which you need to wait for several days. Either way, I couldn't care less at this point but I can tell you that nothing happened. I did not receive that email they were refering to after 3 days. So I basically paid for nothing.

Day 2 tests didn't reach us. We enquired with the The Regenerative Clinic. They insisted that they had been delivered, gave us a tracking number and informed us that it was our responsibility to follow up with Royalmail. The check on Royalmail showed that the receipt had been signed with a mock signature + Royalmail states clearly that the sender has to enquire with them about items which were said to have been delivered but not received, not the recipient. We called the clinic again and discussed with them. Only in a third call we were offered in-clinic tests to make up for the misinformation and their attempt to make us follow up with Royalmail when it was their responsibility. Poor service + trying to mislead clients.
Please Please use some one else if you want same day result as this clinic got answer for there Customer is we can't help we Can't refund you do what it suites you best. …

I hoped to get the result 48 hours after my appointment; I called the contact number listed on the website several times and sent an email on the 31st of August asking for the outcome. After requesting the test result in person today ( 6/9/21) I received the result, nine days after the swab was taken.

Terrible experience! We were a party of 3 and we all paid to get the results same day because we had a flight to catch and they didn’t send one of the results at all!!! I kept calling and they kept saying we’ll see what we can do and we’ll …

No problem taking the test I was the first inline at 8am.
It took 4 days and many emails and telephone calls to get the results. Finally promised to get an email in 10-15 minutes that took 4 hours.

I used the Regenerative clinic before and although it was not the best experience and delayed the results they were helpful on the phone. I thought I should give them another chance. Big mistake! I had to cancel my appointment this time, I sent an email and nobody got back to me. I called them and waited 1 hour on the line only for them to hung up. I am disappointed by the  customer service.

Day 2 test results were not sent. Only after a call a week after the sample was posted, I received an email ... whether or not that email actually reflects the results is unclear to me, since the delay was massive. Not sure why one should pay £80 for such a service.

The system on the day of testing was utterly shambolic. After booking a test for Sunday at 12:05 at Thayer Street, I turned up at 12:00 - precisely following the written  instructions given by the clinic NOT to turn up early - only to find …

Dismal. Information confusing, so I ended up choosing the wrong 2nd and 8th day test for 400GBP instead the necessary one.
The 5th day release was a waste of anther 300GBP as after the 6th day (!) we …

This clinic seemed to be set up to simply milk money and return negative tests. I booked 4 ‘day 2’ tests for me and my family. There was no ID check, the nurse waved the swab around the nostrils and in my case I am not even sure she touched …

I booked a COVID-19 Day 2 test there. It is mentioned on their website that the results will be ready within 48 hours. A week passed after sending my samples, and I haven’t received the results yet. My emails were simply ignored, and after waiting 35 minutes on hold, they just said to wait more because they didn’t have my package.

Recently I've booked a day 2 PCR test, the date was incorrect and a reschedule is required in order to be on the second day in the country. After multiple e-mails and phone calls (oddly always put the 19-21 in the queue) there has been no response to any of the inquiries makes me think there's no helpdesk at all.

Sorry I have to give one star, as this company is even not deserving it. I booked same day result test Monday, Dec 13 in Kingston Bentall branch, until now the evening of Dec 15th, there is no result sent to me without any explanation, on …

I took my 2 DAY PCR - SAME DAY RESULT past 4th of Dec and I’m still waiting. 48 hours later I have no notice of my results. The phone queue is 70 min deleay and anybody answer by email. I feel cheated after paid a high amount of money.

I do not recommend this clinic for test PCR. They said I was positive and published my results at NHS site without my permission. I made a second 'free' PCR test the same day with NHS which I didn't knew before my arrival at UK and my results were negative!! They literally ruined my entire vacations :( This clinic temper with results or do not posses the right technology to provide you the correct results !

Poor service, long queues, unreasonable refund policy which was updated on the website AFTER I had payed. I tried to reschedule my appointment, but no one picked up the phone or replied my multiple emails. In the end, I ended up paying 170 € which they refuse to refund. Avoid this place at all costs.

BEWARE - FALSE CLAIM: Website explicitly claims to provide the correct PCR test to fly to Hong Kong with Cathay Pacific (ISO 15189), which is the exact destination and carrier we were using. Despite their claim, this was not the case and we …

I was advised incorrect information by one of their representatives when I called up to ask a few questions regarding booking a fit to fly test. Upon completing the booking online, the email confirmation advised differing information to what I was told on the phone. I requested a refund which was granted, however I was charged a £10 admin fee for the cancellation, despite the admin error on their part. Very disappointing.

This place DOES NOT give you the Same day result as advertised. The result should arrive by 11pm and I haven't received anything. So dont waste your money. Rang the call center and got an automated queue with position 42, then spoke to someone who put me on hold and hung up after 5 minutes. DON'T BOTHER!
Had a terrible experience with one of their customer agents over the phone in which I was labelled as a ‘Rude customer’….When I asked to speak to a manager, the agent hung up on me. …

Well done you muppets. A friend gets a PCR test and the lab  sends the results with a date of birth 1911, 120 years old ? ? He tries to contact you with a two hour waiting time, emails you with no response and then eventually managing to …
I purchased a 2 day test because I'm coming to London. I didn't receive my personal code like it was supposed to happen. I need it for my Passager Located Form.

If you want to get a reliable test result, don't consider The Regenerative Clinic.
Putney PCR Day2 on 30/12. Staff member need proper training.  Swab were not …

Careful of this place. If the government changes  policy and you cancel your test to fly they will only give 50% refund and they are unhelpful and unsympathetic on the phone. They charge astronomical prices so if you have to cancel a family you are losing 100’s of £ for nothing. Feeling scammed.

The website advertises a test result within 23:00 if test taken before 15:00 which is nog true. I made my test at 11:35 and the test results arrived at 23:59. It’s not the cheapest option in the marked and it’s even not reliable service. I don’t recommend
Never got my COVID test results and waited on the line for customer services for an hour and a half before finally hanging up. Attempted to email and also got ignored.

The advertised time frame is not real, you will not get your results in 24h!
On the phone they will be condescending, argont and cheeky, alldoe you will pay for theyr wages by taking the tests. …

Absolutely useless. I spoke to a lady called Zuzanna Koziol, on the second week off July to arrange injections for my cervical spine conversation ended with appointment being booked on the 7th off August. I asked her to email me asap the …

Took Day 2 tests and it was sent finally with a delay after I kept calling 2 times. Each call had a huge waiting line and took 40 min. Really dissatisfied.
The PCR Fit to Fly were sent on time though.

The clinic needs to inform customers that the certificate they provide does not have a QR Code which is a requirement for some airlines. Absolutely disgusted at their dismissive approach towards solving issues, lies that the issue will be …

Your PCR express test that takes 3 hours to do as per your site in my case took 4hours 20 min to send by your London Marylebone clinic.!!! That is not good practice and certainly not for the amount of money you are charging.

Scam - avoid!
Paid £££ for 4-hour Day 2 PCR test...did not receive code to complete Passenger Locator Form. Try calling, but 106 in queue!

Disorganised and massively overbooked. Expect to wait outside for 30-40 mins after your appointment time. In addition I paid for a same day service and did not receive my results on the same day. I would suggest you look elsewhere.

Paid for same day covid test at Canary Wharf which had to receive result by midnight for me and my wife... I got my result at 4am next day (not same day) but for my wife it's 10am next day and still waiting.... Trying to call only to be told that I have to wait 115 minutes for someone to take my call!  Avoid

Paid for the 24-36 hour results window, and they could not deliver on time.
Then, when the report finally arrives the dates are incorrect.
Truly an incompetent company.
Poor customer service. Not honest about ‘next day results’. Over 28 hrs and still waiting. May miss the flight tomorrow morning. Not helpful when called and cannot do anything to track sample status.
First time I've left a review but felt compelled. The test was 72 hours late and the customer service was non-existent despite numerous attempts.

Everyone there are amazingly friendly, and I really felt looked after.

However, as someone who has stage 4 and 5 osteoarthritis in both hips, I feel that lipogems procedure probably shouldn't have been offered.

There seemed to be some confusion around recovery times. At consultation I was told 3 months, a former patient who had success, told me 1-2 weeks, on the day I was told a maximum of 6 months?

Doing everything to support my healing, with physio and a low inflammation diet, did cause some easing, however Im unsure if that's the procedures influence.

9months later, I'm back to looking at replacements, due to an increase of pain and lack of mobility. In addition to this the xrays (at my expense) after the procedure showed no improvement.

Sadly it would seem I must fall into the 20% that don't have any success.

If you have a year to waste and private insurance to foot the bill, then I'd say go for it. However if you're self funding and have quite advanced stages, then I'd say this probably isn't for you.

And be mindful that it will be registered as a pre existing condition/treatment on your records, which may implicate further treatments, depending on duration and who you're with.

Wanted to share some hindsights honestly so that it maybe become someone's foresight.

Best wishes

K

Place is a bit of a sham, great stuff fast service but their certificates won't work with no apps for example it wont work with TousAntiCovid, unlike most of other test centers like expresstest in heathrow, and you not gonna get no refund, avoid.

Utterly useless organisation, DO NOT USE......EVER!!!!!
Booked an appointmentment and was left queuing in the rain for 45 minutes. They issue to many appointments for their capacity and have absolutely no regard for their customers.  It is purely a numbers game to them, revenue is all that matters. I repeat ......DO NOT USE!!!!

Been here a few times with no issue - they are fast and efficient. Today, I serviced by an elderly gentleman working there who was extremely rude and borderline racist. Probably won’t be coming here any more after this last experience.
We were supposed to receive day two test kit the second day. We received it in the fourth day. This, we can’t leave our flat on the fifth day like the rules say. Because we are considered day two!

My day 2 test was delivered on day 6, had to chase it 2x.
Received result from my day 8th test after 5 days, I had to do 13 days of quarantine, YEY what a service!

It's been almost 48 hours and no results yet (Day-2 Next Day Results Test).

Call center line constantly jammed up. Caller number 87 in the line! …

It was advertised that the covid 19 rapid antigen test would take 15 minutes,  when my husband called it was confirmed that would take 15 minutes.When we were performing the test the nurse said 4 hours.We waited for 4 hours and nothing …
Took my money for a kit by post. Never sent kit.  Have contacted them twice for a refund no response. Don''t use. Unreliable, they are just stealing your money.

Awful, test result was emailed 3 hours later than the maximum delay time announced. No attention to sort the issue.
Lost the fly.
Very bad experience, not recommend

The doctor we are seeing is great however it is so difficult to get through admin at times. Phone lines are disconnected or emails not answered. Some staff are not solution orientated . On this basis I wouldn't recommend but we are only using the service because of a certain doctor
booked a test and they didn't provide me with the booking reference for the passenger locator form had to book another one and they wouldn't refund my money. worst service ever
Booked an appointment in Putney and was met with a queue of over 50 people. No warning about this in advance and it took over 2 hours to be seen
Should have gotten my test results in 48hours. Well, I got mine after 103hours. Worthless!!
Cancelled a test, they don’t give fully refund, I didn’t know they could do it, they did nothing but get my money and I feel scammed
I bought Day 2 test but after 10 days I am still waiting to receive the test kit.
Test did not come back on time, tried to chase, 32 people in telephone q. Emailed, but no answer. Very disappointed.
Not getting a refund for a test appointment which never took place. Feels like getting scammed.
Didn't receive my result and waited over an hour for someone to pick up the phone
They are not reliable. Very rude and unprofessional staff
Very bad service and expensive
Beware of their “refund” policies
Brighton clinic - Oversell and under deliver
not very responsive
Stay away.

I had to buy the COVID test three times because I never received the reference code. They don't answer emails. I had to call from Spain to get them to sort it out and send me the confirmation email so I could travel. And finally, once I was …

We bought a PCR test with same-day results, and it was a lie; it never arrived. We called, and after a two-hour wait, we started explaining the situation, and they hung up on us. We went to the clinic in person, and they told us they'd send …

Terrible. They didn't send me an email after I took the PCR test on day 2, and when I returned to the clinic to clarify what had happened and get the results, they told me I'd better call because they couldn't do anything. I emailed them, and they still didn't respond... Total disaster.

I got a fit-to-fly PCR test at the Brighton branch and it was fine, all went well, friendly staff, etc. After the test I was handed a 'International Arrivals Day 2 Rapid Antigen Test Kit'. The person who gave me the kit said, "you have to do this test when you get back to the UK" and that was all. I left the test at home so I didn't have to carry it with me in the USA, but took a photo of the box which had a barcode with a 9 digit alphanumeric identifier under it - as I did with all of my other Covid test docs, travel insurance, etc. The night before my return flight when I checked in online, there was a notification from the airline that I had to fill in an online passenger locator form which asked for the day 2 'reference number'. When I entered the number on the box it was rejected and I couldn't complete the form. I couldn't find out why, and the next morning I emailed the Regenerative Clinic but didn't get a reply, then managed to call my wife who found the test kit, read the instructions, paid the fee of £39, and I managed to fill in the form. I wish it had been made clear that all of this had to be done before I returned to the UK. Who needs added stress at a time when travel is incredibly stressful anyway? It took hours for me to sort this out. I went to the Brighton clinic and spoke to a member of staff who apologised for the mix up, but she agreed that the process involving arrivals tests is not very clear. So why wasn't that point made when the test kit was given to me? Altogether I paid £118 for tests, plus additional phone and data costs incurred in the US but words are free to dispense - I would like to have heard more information and instruction when the test was first given to me.

Unreliable. They are obviously taking more work than they can handle. I ordered a next-day COVID Day 2 PCR test to be done in clinic rather than a home kit so that I can be certain I will get the result on time and be able to go to work. I …
Two stars because I believe the costumer service agents did everything they could, and were genuine in their desire to help me. …

Test service is easy but unreliable. Day 2 PCR test arrived later than promised and I was only able to obtain my results after calling to chase them up. The certificate suggests the results were reported that evening but no result more than 48h later. Disappointing for a £79 service.

I've done a couple of PCR tests that have come through rapidly and accurately (though this is not the cheapest service that you can use). However, I had a very bad experience today: wrong passport number and wrong destination on the …

Results were not sent.

It took two phone calls to get the issue resolved, each phone call you have to …

I did 4 tests already with this clinic as i travel internationally all the time. Two days ago, The clinic did not send me the correct result of my antigen, they sent me results of an old test instead , I had to call twice and send 2 emails for them to correct it and then they only sent me the correct results two days later! I was at the station onboarding a train when i sent my second message to remind them  and would have missed it if the police person had not been comprehensive and let me pass despite me not having result with me. Otherwise the clinic at Marylebone is quick and nice staff work there

I’m not completely satisfied with this clinic. After booking the second day test I didn’t receive the reference code. Had to call them, from abroad to request that info.
Back in England, after being tested, I was supposed to get results 48h after but that wasn’t the case. Had to call them again (5 days later). Utter lack of professionalism!

I’m abroad and booked a Day2 COVID test yesterday. But never received the reference number for the passenger locator form - it was supposed to arrive 60 minutes after I booked. I needed to call and wait for more than 30 minutes so I could have my number and finish the form. Was at the border already and it was ver stressful.

I ordered 2nd day test and had it done on Tuesday 14th of September. I was told I will get my results within 48 hrs. Unfortunately, a week later and I still have not received anything. No contact and noone answering calls. …

Got scammed £150 for a test not done. After an accidental double booking the clinic refused to refund one of the bookings even when we explained the situation in person, before the appointment time. No respect for customers, never going …

It took forever to get the results. They said 48 hours, but I didn’t receive the results after that period. I called them and I was on hold for more than 30 minutes (calling from an international phone). Finally I got the results after 54 hours of having the test.

Absolutely dreadful customer service. Waiting time to speak over 45 minutes. Excuse is high call volumes. Rubbish. High volumes mean high revenues so INVEST IN YOUR CUSTOMER SUPPORT. Will never use them again
The 24-48 hour Day 2 test results arrived one week later - I do not recommend this service.

I appointed a pcr test to do when I arrive in London.But,my trip got cancelled and I tried to cancel my appointment too.I send an email requesting a cancellation and get the refund stated in the terms of service for cancellations made …
I found the person doing my the lateral flow test today a little too harsh with the swab in my nose. If she can be a little gentle it would be helpful. Thank you.

Had the 24/36 hr PCRT.  The booking and test were easy and efficient.  I was told I would get the results middday next day.  But that didn’t happen.  I called at 6pm as was worried but was told I would get my results by 5.30am (which would …

Well. My same day fit to fly PCR test arrived the same day. This aspect of the service exceeded my expectations having read some negative reviews and trying to contact them by phone due to a temp glitch with the booking system. Not taking …

Our 'next day PCR tests' at the Marylebone location were done promptly at the booked time. My wife's temperature was checked and swabs taken from her throat and nose, while I had only a nasal swab taken by a different person. Why the difference? I received my test result after about 20 hours, while my wife got hers after 48 hours and 10 minutes. When we called to enquire, we were subjected to the most awful and stressful noise (certainly not music!) while waiting for more than an hour!

They made an error with my Swab test for COVID-19, and never actually got my results. It took a few tries, but I was able to sort it out a refund with the clinic. Simon was very polite with the situation.

The standard of service & care provided by The Regenerative Clinic was very high. I have no reason to doubt the high levels of success claimed for the Lipogems treatment they provide.

But despite following all guidance (including many subsequent visits to the recommended physio) the Lipogems procedure on my knees was not successful. Disappointing.

Wrong test date on the certificate! The file in the email has the correct date but the date on the antigen certificate was incorrect which I didn't pick up on until Eurostar did! The company had been great up until that point.

While they wrote on the Covid-19 certificate that my result was available the day following my swab, it was communicated to me by e-mail only 4 days later. According to their website, it was supposed to be released to me within 24-48 hours.
Most disorganized and slow testing facility I have ever seen. However, we got our test results back in 24 hours as advertised.
For one of the most expensive PCR tests in London, you’d expect MUCH better customer service.
it took 60 hours to have the results back ,not recomended if you care for swiftness
